headline: A Crude Awakening
summary: U.S. equities slid to 4-month lows as the Iran war rattled markets, sending oil to three-year highs. Read why this could be a 'crude' awakening for REITs.

headline: Equinix (EQIX) Names Olivier Leonetti as Chief Financial Officer
summary: Equinix Inc. (NASDAQ:EQIX) is one of the best AI stocks to invest in according to billionaires. On March 10, Equinix officially named Olivier Leonetti as its new Chief Financial Officer, effective March 16. Leonetti, an experienced executive with over 30 years of financial leadership in the technology and infrastructure sectors, joins the digital infrastructure leader […]
